parsed.simulated_user_message: I think the first small thing I could do is pull up the price list for the medication at a few nearby pharmacies and jot down the cheapest option. It feels like a tiny win that might cut down the dread of the bill. I also want to take a short walk after I look in the mirror, just to breathe and remind myself that my worth isn't tied to the scale.
